overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy running through a desert landscape during a vibrant orange sunset. The character moves steadily along a dirt trail surrounded by Joshua trees, cacti, and flowering desert bushes with mountains visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert trail with large rock outcrop

agents.ego_description: Aloy running steadily along the desert path, moving away from the large rock formation toward the open desert

entered.detail: massive reddish-brown rock formation rising beside the trail
scattered yucca trees with spiky branches silhouetted against the sky
low shrubs with pink and yellow blooms lining the trail
hazy mountain silhouettes on the horizon
tall green cactus with multiple arms visible among the bushes

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Aloy running along a winding dirt trail through a desert landscape at sunset. A large rock outcrop dominates the left side of the frame while Joshua trees and flowering bushes dot the terrain. The camera follows smoothly from behind as the character moves steadily forward, with distant mountains visible through the orange haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: open desert facing the setting sun

events.description: sun disk becomes visible directly ahead, creating strong backlighting and lens flare effects

agents.ego_description: continuing to run toward the setting sun, casting long shadows on the trail

entered.detail: bright orange sun sitting low on the horizon, creating intense backlighting
scattered boulders and rocky outcrops along the trail edge

segments.scene_description: As Aloy rounds the large rock formation, the scene opens into a wide desert vista with the setting sun now directly visible ahead. The lighting shifts to strong backlighting, silhouetting the Joshua trees against the orange sky. The trail continues through rocky terrain with scattered vegetation as the character runs toward the sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding desert trail with Joshua tree clusters

events.description: path curves gently to the right around a large Joshua tree and rocky outcrop

agents.ego_description: navigating the winding desert path while maintaining a steady running pace

entered.detail: low rocky hill covered in sparse vegetation
prominent yucca tree with thick trunk and multiple branches close to the trail

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows Aloy continuing through the desert as the sun sinks lower, bathing the scene in deep orange light. The trail curves around rocky outcrops and large Joshua trees, with flowering bushes now lining both sides of the path. The terrain becomes slightly more undulating as the character approaches the distant mountains.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a desert landscape that transitions from a sheltered trail into a wide, backlit vista under a deepening sunset. It begins with the camera following Aloy from behind as she runs along a winding dirt path flanked by a large rock outcrop, Joshua trees, and flowering bushes. As she rounds the rock formation, the scene opens into an expansive vista where the setting sun becomes directly visible, shifting the lighting to a strong backlight that silhouettes the vegetation against an orange sky. The camera then continues forward through rocky terrain and undulating ground, with the path curving around further outcrops and lush bushes. Finally, the scene is bathed in deep orange light as the character moves steadily toward the distant mountains.
